info.title: dbdeploy
info.description: dbdeploy is a cli tool to manage database migrations. It supports deployments, rollbacks, multiple branches, creation of databases. It works on Windows, Linux and Mac

commands.name: ci
commands.description: Runs a CI test where the migrations are deployed, rolled back and deployed again

options.name: --test
options.description: (Default: false) Enable deployments of test scripts

options.name: --create
options.description:
(Default: false) Enable creation of the database if the
database does not exists

options.name: --branch
options.description:
Name of branch to deploy (defaults to 'main' or the default
branch name set in the global settings)

options.name: --dryrun
options.description:
Enable to test what scripts needs to be deployed without
actually running them

options.name: --path
options.description:
Path of directory containing databases scripts (defaults to
current directory)

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

commands.name: deploy
commands.description: Runs a set of deploy scripts to one or more databases
